news.headline: Pony AI Inc. expands driverless robotaxi services in Shenzhen Nanshan District, following success in Bao'an.First company approved for driverless services in Nanshan, marking a critical step in commercializing autonomous mobility. #PonyAI #Shenzhen #autonomousmobility
news.summary: Pony AI Inc. has recently obtained approval to offer fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in Shenzhen's Nanshan District. This permission comes after the Company's launch of paid robotaxi services in the adjacent Bao'an District. Pony.ai, listed on Nasdaq as PONY, is a prominent player in advancing widespread autonomous mobility. It is the exclusive entity permitted to operate fully driverless commercial robotaxis in Nanshan District, marking a significant advancement in its efforts to commercialize autonomous technology within one of China's bustling cities.

(Nasdaq: TLRY; TSX: TLRY), a leading global consumer packaged goods company, will report its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, which ended on February 28, 2025. news.headline: Coherent launches optical transceivers for data centers with optical circuit switches.
news.summary: A new line of pluggable optical transceivers has been released, designed specifically for data centers utilizing optical circuit switches (OCSs). This innovation is set to revolutionize data center operations, as these transceivers are optimized for seamless integration with OCSs. This development promises enhanced efficiency and performance in data transmission within data centers. Stay updated for more information on this breakthrough technology.

news.headline: Annovis Bio, Inc. (ANVS) receives NYSE notice for noncompliance with market cap and equity requirements.
news.summary: Annovis Bio, Inc., a company focused on developing therapies for neurodegenerative diseases like Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s, disclosed on March 27, 2025, that it is out of compliance with the NYSE listing standards as per the Notice received on March 26, 2025. The NYSE pointed out that Annovis Bio's average global market capitalization over 30 trading days was below $50 million, along with stockholders’ equity also falling below the same threshold. Annovis Bio, listed under NYSE as ANVS, is known for its late-stage clinical drug platform for Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: Uncertainty-driven drop in sentiment could quiet demand.
Fed's Barkin: Moderately restrictive policy stance a good place to be.

Fed's Barkin: Regarding tariffs, given recent high inflation there could be more of an impact on prices, but it is still not known where rates will settle or how affected countries businesses and consumers will respond.
Fed's Barkin: It's hard to imagine the labor market will break toward hiring.
Lululemon Q4 earnings beat estimates: Revenue $3.61B, EPS $6.14. Shares slide on soft guidance. Total revenue up 13%.
news.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc (NASDAQ:LULU) released their fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported $3.61 billion in revenue, exceeding the estimated $3.57 billion. Earnings for the quarter were $6.14 per share, higher than the anticipated $5.85 per share. Total revenue rose by 13% year-over-year, with Americas net revenue up by 7% and international revenue by 38%. Comparable sales also saw a 3% increase compared to the previous year. Lululemon now operates 767 stores following the opening of 18 new company-operated stores in the quarter. Inventory levels grew by 9% year-over-year.

news.headline: Teva Pharmaceutical releases Q1 2025 financial guidance. Document available for investors. Global biopharmaceutical leader.
news.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. announced that their Q1 2025 Aide Memoire can now be accessed on the "Investors" page of their website. The Aide Memoire is designed to aid in financial modeling of their quarterly results and includes data from various sources, as well as insights from management regarding Teva's business outlook. Moving forward, Teva plans to release this information towards the end of each quarter. Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. is a global biopharmaceutical leader, listed on NYSE and TASE, with over 120 years of experience in delivering innovative medicines to patients worldwide. For more information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Neuronetics revised Q4 2024 results with net loss of $12.7 million and full year 2024 with net loss of $43.7 million. Operating expenses increased due to accounting updates post acquisition of Greenbrook TMS Inc.
news.summary: Neuronetics, Inc. provided an update on its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The revisions included a $0.6 million reduction in the 2024 bonus accrual related to the acquisition of Greenbrook TMS Inc., resulting in increased operating expenses and a decrease in adjusted EBITDA. For the fourth quarter of 2024, the net loss and net loss per share increased to $(12.7) million and $(0.34), respectively. Full-year 2024 results showed an increase in net loss and net loss per share to $(43.7) million and $(1.38), respectively, with a decrease in adjusted EBITDA to $(21.8) million. The updated financial statements were attached to the press release, reflecting these accounting updates. Neuronetics specializes in neuroscience, offering non-drug, noninvasive NeuroStar Therapy for mental health conditions. They aim to provide exceptional treatments with extraordinary results. The company cautions investors with forward-looking statements and emphasizes risks and uncertainties in the industry. For further information, investors can contact Mike Vallie or Mark Klausner at ICR Healthcare, and for media inquiries, they can contact EvolveMKD.

news.headline: Metalla reports strong 2024 fiscal year results, generating $5.9M revenue, 2,481 GEOs at $2,411 avg price and $19 cash cost per GEO. Plans for 2025 include continued growth in GEO production and free cash flow. Multiple assets show progress and increased production for the upcoming year.
news.summary: Metalla Royalty & Streaming Ltd. reported its operating and financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The company received or accrued payments on 2,481 attributable Gold Equivalent Ounces (GEOs) at an average realized price of $2,411 and an average cash cost of $19 per GEO, generating revenues of $5.9 million. The net loss was $5.5 million, with Adjusted EBITDA of $1.4 million. Significant developments include first production milestones achieved at various sites like Tocantinzinho and La Guitarra, with future operations like Endeavor and Amalgamated Kirkland anticipated to start in 2025. The company had an operating cash margin of $2,401 per GEO. Shareholders can request a hard copy of the financial statements for 2024. The company's CEO, Brett Heath, highlighted positive milestones achieved in 2024 and expected substantial growth in GEO production and free cash flow in 2025. The company expects to receive or accrue payments on 3,500 to 4,500 GEOs in 2025 from various sources. Asset updates for projects like Tocantinzinho, Wharf, Aranzazu, La Guitarra, La Encantada, Endeavor, Côté-Gosselin, and Taca Taca were also provided. Management's focus on aligning leadership's financial interests with shareholders led to the adoption of a minimum share ownership policy for directors and officers. Key developments at various mining sites demonstrate progress and expansion efforts in different regions. Metalla's strategic investments and partnerships position it for further growth in the future.

news.headline: US public debt on track to reach 107% of GDP by 2029, 156% by 2055, with a projected 6.3% deficit over 30 years.
news.summary: The U.S. economy is on track to experience a historic surge in public debt, with the Congressional Budget Office forecasting that federal debt held by the public will reach 107% of GDP by 2029 and an alarming 156% by 2055. This increase is driven by chronic budget deficits, with the federal deficit expected to average 6.3% of GDP over the next 30 years, significantly higher than the historical average of 3.7%. The rise in debt is set to restrict economic growth, increase interest payments on U.S. debt held by foreign entities, and pose significant financial stability risks. The report paints a bleak picture of future economic trends and policy freedom for the United States.

news.headline: Mayor Brandon Johnson launches Build Better Together, advancing economic development in Chicago for growth, housing, jobs, and cultural improvements.
news.summary: Mayor Brandon Johnson of Chicago unveiled a new project called Build Better Together on March 27, 2025. This initiative aims to enhance economic growth and development in the city by improving the quality of housing, promoting businesses, creating job opportunities, and enhancing the overall lifestyle and cultural experiences for residents. The project seeks to address various aspects of economic development and is expected to have a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and economy. More information can be found on the project's website at https://www.chicago....

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. declares C$0.02 quarterly dividend for 2025, becoming the first one for this year.

The Board of Directors authorized a dividend payment of C$0.02 per share. news.headline: Join ABQAURP as a Corporate Member for visibility in health care quality industry. Offers for 2025 NEW PORT RICHEY, Fla.
news.summary: In March 27, 2025, a partnership was established with the American Board of Quality Assurance and Utilization Review Physicians (ABQAURP) for Corporate Membership. This alliance provides organizations with visibility in the healthcare quality sector. The partnership signifies a strategic move towards enhancing industry presence, with opportunities for collaboration and networking. This initiative aims to promote quality standards and practices within the healthcare field. The collaboration is set to leverage ABQAURP's expertise and insights in quality assurance and utilization review. Joining as a Corporate Member offers access to a diverse network of professionals, furthering engagement and knowledge-sharing. The partnership in 2025 underscores a commitment to advancing quality initiatives and fostering excellence in healthcare.

news.headline: Heliogen, Inc. reports fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial and operational results; emphasizing deployment of renewable energy solutions.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California, Heliogen, Inc. (OTCQX: HLGN), a renewable energy firm employing concentrated sunlight and thermal energy storage for sustainable, cost-efficient, low-carbon energy, released its financial and operational performance for Q4 and full year 2024. The company emphasized deploying its proven power solutions, conserving cash, and reallocating resources. Key data includes continued focus on cost-effective renewable energy solutions, highlighting the importance of financial stability and operational efficiency.

news.headline: Pieridae Energy plans to rebrand as Cavvy Energy in a strategic move.
news.summary: A new report reveals that over 1.5 million people have been affected by the recent flooding in the region, with approximately 500,000 homes being damaged or destroyed. Officials are coordinating relief efforts to provide aid to those impacted by the disaster. The flooding has also caused widespread power outages, affecting more than 350,000 residents. The local government has set up emergency shelters to accommodate the thousands of people who have been displaced. Additionally, emergency services have conducted over 200 rescues in the affected areas. The total cost of the damages is estimated to be over $100 million, with experts warning of potential long-term economic consequences for the region.

news.headline: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. promotes 3 executives: Max Jenkins to EVP, AJ Peil to EVP, Robert Salisbury to SVP.
news.summary: PRINCETON, N.J.-- Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. revealed the advancement of key executives today. Max Jenkins now holds the position of EVP, Chief Operating Officer, while AJ Peil, CFA has been appointed as EVP, Chief Investment Officer. Robert Salisbury, CFA also secures a promotion to SVP, Head of Corporate Finance and Strategy within the Company. Pete Mavoides, President and CEO of the Company, expressed satisfaction in acknowledging the contributions of these three individuals.

news.headline: Civeo Corp (NYSE: CVEO) to repurchase up to 10% of common shares over next 12 months after 5% repurchase completed.
news.summary: Houston-based Civeo Corporation (NYSE: CVEO) has unveiled a new share repurchase initiative. The company's Board of Directors approved this program, permitting the repurchase of up to 10% of its total outstanding common shares in the coming year. Previously, on September 11, 2024, Civeo completed another share repurchase program, which targeted 5% of its total common shares at the time. This latest move reflects the company's ongoing commitment to enhancing shareholder value through strategic investment opportunities.

news.headline: S&P CoreLogic Case-Shiller Index reports 4.1% annual gain in Jan 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, S&P Dow Jones Indices unveiled the January 2025 data for the S&P CoreLogic Case-Shiller Indices, a key metric for U.S. home pricing. The report indicated a 4.1% year-over-year growth in January 2025, showing a minor uptick from the last reported figures.

news.headline: AOFAS honors two female orthopaedic leaders with the 2025 Women's Leadership Awards: Rebecca A. Cerrato, MD, and Pamela C. Luk, MD.
news.summary: In Schaumburg, Illinois on March 27, 2025, the American Orthopaedic Foot & Ankle Society (AOFAS) revealed the winners of the 2025 Women's Leadership Awards. The honorees are Rebecca A. Cerrato, MD, and Pamela C. Luk, MD. These prestigious awards were granted by AOFAS, recognizing their exceptional contributions to the field.

news.headline: Generational Group helps sell Arcadia GlassHouse, LLC to North Park Group, LLC in Madison, Ohio. Sale closed January 21, 2025.
news.summary: Generational Group, a prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm specializing in privately held businesses, has successfully facilitated the sale of Arcadia Glasshouse, LLC to North Park Group, LLC. This transaction was finalized on January 21, 2025. Situated in Madison, Ohio, Arcadia Glasshouse is renowned for manufacturing, distributing, and installing top-tier greenhouses that seamlessly combine architectural sophistication, longevity, and eco-friendliness. These greenhouses are constructed using high-grade glass or polycarbonate panels, reinforced with efficient energy-saving technologies.

news.headline: UDR announces board update: James “Jim” D. Klingbeil not seeking re-election. He will continue until his term ends.
news.summary: In Denver, UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, disclosed today that James “Jim” D. Klingbeil will not pursue re-election to the Company’s Board of Directors at the upcoming Annual Shareholder Meeting. Mr. Klingbeil will retain his position on the Board until the current term concludes at the same meeting, after which he will step down as Lead Independent Director.
